title: 333 Things you noticed
wikitext:
[]: [3.33] Things you noticed Post by qu4d » Tue Apr 23, 2013 6:19 am In the tradition of NAveryW's threads... "the things you noticed"-thread for little details and stuff, that doesnt fit anywhere else and stuff. edit: The first thing I'd like to mention... dunno, maybe I missed it in the eva 13 thread, but, everything about it looks like a baby. The womb... ...the amniotic fluid... ...the C-section ...the baby with blood over all of it... ...and before Eva 13 rises to the sky, the 12th angel looks like a fetus You can see the head with the eye, the leg, an arm with fingers...

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 23, 2013 8:25 am It's funny -- I could see the folds of the "womb" being pulled back as early as the booklet scans, even though nobody else could see them. By the way, the giant fetus is the 12th Angel, not Eva-13. Split out the audio tangent.

[]: Post by qu4d » Tue Apr 23, 2013 8:30 am I saw it before, but I wasn't sure and wanted to see the real deal And ok, I didn't realize it was angel #12, because theres so much going on. But I knew it wasnt Eva 13, because it's about to go upwards / fixed the sentence, I see the missunderstanding.

[]: Post by pioneer » Tue Apr 23, 2013 9:07 am i noticed that in the preview, after jumping over the hill or whatever, the ground is a bunch of AT fields? what's up with that?

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Apr 23, 2013 9:11 am pioneer wrote: i noticed that in the preview, after jumping over the hill or whatever, the ground is a bunch of AT fields? what's up with that?

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Apr 23, 2013 9:45 am This thread is going to be inundated with my posts tomorrow, after I've let my first good watch of it sink in. ;)

[]: Post by qu4d » Tue Apr 23, 2013 10:13 am An aircraft of the JSSDF near Lilith?

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Apr 23, 2013 10:22 am There was a battleship in that room as well, I'm not surprised that it has aircraft too.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 23, 2013 10:43 am You can clearly see Eva-01 in that zoom-out AAA Wunder schematic around the 35min mark, in block-shaped restraints marked with the number "666" (lol). "AAA" also stands for "Autonomous Assault Ark".

[]: Post by Rei IV » Tue Apr 23, 2013 10:44 am We actually see the Nemesis series "tentacles" (whatever the hell you want to call them) before they pierce through the Wunder's wings. Come to think of it, the scene where the Wunder rises has been redone, if just a bit.

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Tue Apr 23, 2013 10:50 am Reichu wrote: You can clearly see Eva-01 in that zoom-out AAA Wunder schematic around the 35min mark, in block-shaped restraints marked with the number "666" (lol). "AAA" also stands for "Autonomous Assault Ark".

[]: Post by notalive » Tue Apr 23, 2013 10:52 am Apparently the room with an abandoned tank (was it supposed to be Eva helmet storage or something?) is just a room full of tanks. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by qu4d » Tue Apr 23, 2013 10:55 am ElMariachi wrote: Where do you see the meaning of the AAA acronym? Also "Ark"? That will give ammunition for the people thinking the Wunder would be the Rebuild version of the White Moon(i.e. a FAR Seed transport) Still the acronym is kickass!

[]: Post by bladerj » Tue Apr 23, 2013 1:17 pm Pics come later but, mark 6 IS the head of lilith impaling himself, thats why he was so huge, previous scenes when Shinji arrived geofront shows a huge battle, so it seems, mark 6 was contaminated with an angel and fused with lilith. we have the name for the at field drones too, RS HOPPER units 1 to 4 Eva new units recharge via the gauntlet on ther arms, kinda odd but looks like via induction ? Also, did Misato lost an eye ? we always only see her left eye in all shots, the right is always obscured by the glasses, light,camera angle,hat or shadows,kinda ominous.

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:15 pm When Kaworu and Shinji are suiting up to enter Eva 13 we can see diffrent symbols on their plugsuit's backs, both seem like letters of the greek alphabet, Shinji's is an alpha and Kaworu's resembles a lambda. This might have been spotted already as this scene was in the trailers but I just noticed it. Edit: Never mind, the scene that follows clears up the mystery, their entry plugs are marked 13alpha and 13A, so apparently it was just a form of distinguishing the pilots.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:26 pm bladerj wrote: mark 6 IS the head of lilith impaling himself, (snip)

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:28 pm When Eva 13 is inside the 12th Angel, hundreds of Rei projections are shown on the Angel's body. That and Anno has graduated from side boob to straight up ass shots & closeups of lady crotches.

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:30 pm http://imgur.com/X9wmOag Ladies and gentlemen, I present to you Eva-04 edit: I'm being told that this isn't new, but I think we need to sit back and actually treat this thing as an Eva unit and whatever that might entail. Anyway, discussion in another thread ongoing.

[]: Post by bladerj » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:44 pm @reichu, look at the info screen, it details the units and how many are left 0, SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by notalive » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:44 pm Here are some pics you've been talking about: Eva-01 in that zoom-out AAA Wunder schematic around the 35min mark, in block-shaped restraints marked with the number "666" SPOILER: Show
